headline.en: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring: Built together, designed for the future

text.en: Today we present Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring, our anniversary release. It gives you even more choice for your tools, a refined UI, stress-free collaboration, and the new platform strategy that enables developers to benefit more from our vast ecosystem. Built together, designed for the future.

en.alt: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring: Built together, designed for the future

headline.en: Do you already know this app?

text.en: A simple weekly planner inspired by Tweek, living right inside your Nextcloud. Easy planning with full control over your data.
Customizable service dashboard to organize your services in categories, monitor status, and access everything from Nextcloud.
Household management app to keep your house organized collaboratively with checklists, photo boards, notes and more.
Nextcloud version of the popular game Mastermind, where you have to crack a code consisting of five colors within a fixed number of turns.

headline.en: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring: Built together, designed for the future

headline.en: Vote for Nextcloud in the CloudComputing-Insider Award 2026

text.en: Is Nextcloud your top choice as cloud content management solution? Vote for us in the CloudComputing-Insider Award 2026 and show your support!

en.alt: Vote for Nextcloud in the CloudComputing-Insider Award 2026

headline.en: Nextcloud Community Conference 2026: Call for speakers

text.en: Passionate about data privacy and Nextcloud? We invite you speak at the Nextcloud Community Conference to share your experience, knowledge and news with the community!

en.alt: Nextcloud Community Conference 2026: Call for speakers

headline.en: How working with multiple vendors is hurting your organization: The impact of vendor sprawl

text.en: Too many SaaS tools? Vendor sprawl is hurting your organization because of audit fatigue, data sprawl, and transparency risks. Learn how to take back control.

en.alt: How working with multiple vendors is hurting your organization: The impact of vendor sprawl

headline.en: How digital sovereignty is accelerating: millions of new enterprise users and over 50% growth for Nextcloud

text.en: Explore how millions of new users and rapid growth are driving adoption of open, secure collaboration platforms like Nextcloud.

en.alt: How digital sovereignty is accelerating: millions of new enterprise users and over 50% growth for Nextcloud
